name: ASUS PRO Q670M-C-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-4800 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Intel GbE LAN - M.2 slot only (Key E, CNVi & PCIe)
shortName: ASUS PRO Q670M-C-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro ATX Intel Q670 professional motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 and dual DisplayPort.
